message:
🐛 Remove setup project dependency to fix CI browser issues

The setup project was trying to use chromium even when running
firefox/webkit tests, but CI only installs the specific browser
for each job. Since each test handles its own auth mocking in
beforeEach, the global setup project is not needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
